Selenophile Cafe
Benefits Stories Book Space

Work, Dine, and Connect in BTM’s Favorite Hidden Gem

Experience the perfect blend of artisanal continental cuisine, premium barista coffee, and a serene co-working environment designed for productivity and play.

Explore Kunafa & Co-working

Why Startups Love Selenophile

Productive Co-working Hub

High-speed free Wi-Fi and dedicated meeting rooms for seamless WFH sessions. We keep the vibe calm so you stay focused.

Signature Continental Menu

From authentic Turkish Kunafa to creamy Pesto Pasta and gourmet burgers. Fuel your hustle with high-quality ingredients.

Community Networking

Regular mixers and get-togethers designed to help freelancers and entrepreneurs connect in a relaxed setting.

Interactive Entertainment

A variety of board games and Rubik's cubes to enjoy while your fresh meal is prepared. Take a break, you've earned it.

What Our Community Says

"A hidden gem for WFH folks. Cozy working space, great coffee, and the signature Kunafa is a must-try!"

— Freelance Designer

"The networking mixers have been beneficial for my freelance business. Best place for meetings in BTM."

— Startup Founder

"Amazing food and service. The environment is so calm and cool, perfect for getting work done or hanging out."

— Remote Developer

Ready to elevate your workday?

Whether you're craving our signature Kunafa or need a quiet corner for a meeting, we've got the space for you.
